tools.name: fetch-web-page
tools.description:
Fetches the content of a web page and returns the HTML. 
Use this to get the content of a web page.

url.description: The URL of the web page to fetch.

content.content: What is the capital of France? Make sure to use the web search tool.

response.delta: user is asking about the capital of France and explicitly requesting that I use the web search tool. Even though I know
the answer, I'll comply with their request.
